case_title: BETTY YEE VS. CARLOS ALBERTO GARCIA MANZANARES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA MANZANARES, CARLOS ALBERTO IN INDIVIDUAL DBA ALL STATES ELECTRIC SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
